title: ComfyUI Tutorial Series Ep 36: WAN 2.1 Installation – Turn Text & Images into Video!
description:
In this episode, we go through the step-by-step process of setting up the WAN 2.1 model in ComfyUI, allowing you to create videos from both text and images—right on your own computer! 🚀

We’ll start by updating ComfyUI, installing the necessary nodes, and setting up the required models. You’ll also get a clear breakdown of how different versions of the WAN model impact video quality, speed, and compatibility with your hardware. Whether you're working with 1.3B, 14B, or GGUF models, this guide will help you find the best fit for your workflow. 🔧

Additionally, we explore frame rate settings, video length calculations, and how to fine-tune prompts for optimal results. By the end, you’ll have everything you need to generate smooth AI-driven animations with ComfyUI! 🎬

Don’t forget to grab the free workflows on Discord and join the conversation with other creators. Let’s bring your AI video ideas to life! ✨

Get the workflows and instructions from discord for free
https://discord.gg/gggpkV
